description: Ordered course assignments within a learning path. Replaces the courses JSON array that was embedded inside learning_paths. One row per course per path.

fields.name: learning_path_id
fields.description: Learning path this course belongs to

fields.name: sequence_no
fields.description: Order of this course within the path (1-based)

fields.name: relevance_score
fields.description: Relevance score 0â€“100 for this course within the learner's path

fields.name: match_reason
fields.description: Short reason why this course was included in the path
fields.example: Covers essential backend development skills aligned with the student's learning track.

fields.name: why_recommended
fields.description: Longer justification for recommendation shown to the learner
fields.example: Covers essential backend development skills aligned with the student's learning track.

fields.name: status
fields.description: Learner's current status for this course

fields.name: completion_percentage
fields.description: Overall course completion percentage 0â€“100, derived from module progress

fields.name: started_at
fields.description: When the learner started this course

fields.name: completed_at
fields.description: When the learner completed this course

sample_records.match_reason: Covers essential backend development skills aligned with the student's learning track.
sample_records.why_recommended: Covers essential backend development skills aligned with the student's learning track.
